name: Altless Abra
description: Header logo is missing an alt attribute, so screen readers cannot describe it.

detection.fixedWhen: alt attribute is present on the header-text.svg image

hint: Add a descriptive alt attribute to the element, or if it is decorative, use alt="".

name: Decorative Diglett
description: The pokeball decorative image is exposed to screen readers. It should be hidden from assistive technology.

detection.fixedWhen: pokeball image has aria-hidden="true" or alt=""

hint: Decorative images should have alt="" or aria-hidden="true" so screen readers skip them.

name: Imagey Igglybuff
description: The site title 'A11yDex' is rendered as an image of text instead of real text.

detection.fixedWhen: Site title is rendered as a real text element (e.g. <h1>) not an image

hint: Replace the image of text with a real <h1> text element. Use CSS for styling instead.

name: Contrast Cubone
description: Multiple text elements have insufficient colour contrast ratios (below 4.5:1).

detection.fixedWhen: All text has a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 against its background

hint: Use a colour contrast checker to ensure text meets the 4.5:1 ratio for normal text.

name: Tiny Tentacool
description: Timestamp text is set to font-size: 10px, which is too small to read comfortably.

detection.fixedWhen: No text is smaller than 12px (ideally 16px for body text)

hint: Ensure all text is at least 12px, and body text is at least 16px. Use relative units (rem/em).

name: Colourblind Chansey
description: Error states on the chat input are indicated only by a red border colour, with no icon or text.

detection.fixedWhen: Error states include text or an icon in addition to colour

hint: Never use colour as the sole means of conveying information. Add an error message or icon.

name: Zoomy Zubat
description: The chat container uses overflow: hidden, which clips content when the page is zoomed to 400%.

detection.fixedWhen: Content reflows properly at 400% zoom without being clipped

hint: Replace overflow: hidden with overflow: auto or visible, and ensure content reflows at high zoom levels.

name: Landmarkless Lapras
description: The page uses only <div> elements with no semantic HTML landmarks (<header>, <main>, <nav>, <footer>).

detection.fixedWhen: Page has <header>, <main>, and <footer> landmarks

hint: Replace <div> wrappers with semantic HTML elements: <header>, <main>, <nav>, <footer>.

name: Heading Haunter
description: Heading levels are skipped: <h1> is missing, then <h3> appears, then <h5>.

detection.fixedWhen: Heading levels are sequential (h1, h2, h3) with no skips

hint: Start with <h1> and increase sequentially. Never skip levels (e.g. h1 → h3).

name: Skipless Skarmory
description: There is no 'skip to main content' link, forcing keyboard users to tab through all navigation.

detection.fixedWhen: A skip-to-content link is present as the first focusable element

hint: Add a visually-hidden skip link as the first element in <body> that jumps to the main content.

name: Titleless Togepi
description: The page <title> is set to 'page', which is generic and unhelpful.

detection.fixedWhen: Page title is descriptive (e.g. 'A11yDex - Accessibility Chat Assistant')

hint: Set a descriptive, unique page title that tells users what the page is about.

name: Focusless Fearow
description: All focus indicators are removed with outline: none, making it impossible for keyboard users to see where they are.

detection.fixedWhen: Focus indicators are visible on all interactive elements

hint: Remove the global outline: none rule. Add visible focus styles (:focus-visible) to interactive elements.

name: Vague Vulpix
description: A link uses the text 'Click here' with no context about where it leads.

detection.fixedWhen: Link text is descriptive (e.g. 'View gallery' or 'Intern submissions')

hint: Link text should describe the destination. Replace 'Click here' with meaningful text.

name: Tabindex Teddiursa
description: Elements have positive tabindex values (tabindex='3', tabindex='5'), creating an illogical tab order.

detection.fixedWhen: No positive tabindex values exist (only 0 or -1)

hint: Remove all positive tabindex values. Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus.

name: Trapped Tangela
description: The custom dropdown in the disclaimer traps keyboard focus — users can tab in but cannot tab out or close it with Escape.

detection.fixedWhen: Dropdown can be closed with Escape and focus returns to the trigger element

hint: Add an Escape key handler to close the dropdown and return focus to the trigger button.

name: Marquee Magikarp
description: The scrolling ticker auto-plays with no way to pause, stop, or hide it.

detection.fixedWhen: Ticker has a visible pause/stop button, or is removed entirely

hint: Add a pause/stop button for auto-moving content, or use prefers-reduced-motion to disable animation.

name: Tiny Target Tyrogue
description: The close button on the disclaimer is only 16x16 pixels, below the 24x24px minimum target size.

detection.fixedWhen: All interactive targets are at least 24x24px

hint: Increase the close button to at least 24x24px. Use padding to increase the touch/click target.

name: Langless Larvitar
description: The <html> element is missing the lang attribute, so screen readers cannot determine the page language.

detection.fixedWhen: The <html> element has lang="en"

hint: Add lang="en" to the <html> element so screen readers know the page language.

name: Labelless Lickitung
description: The chat input field has no associated <label> or aria-label.

detection.fixedWhen: Input has an associated <label> element or aria-label attribute

hint: Add a <label> element linked by htmlFor/id, or add an aria-label attribute to the input.

name: Errorless Eevee
description: Submitting an empty message produces no visible error message — only the border turns red.

detection.fixedWhen: A visible, descriptive error message appears when the form is submitted empty

hint: Display a text error message (e.g. 'Please enter a message') and associate it with the input using aria-describedby.

name: Inconsistent Ivysaur
description: Navigation links appear in a different order on the main page vs the gallery page.

detection.fixedWhen: Navigation order is consistent across all pages

hint: Use a shared navigation component to ensure consistent link ordering across pages.

name: Buttonless Bulbasaur
description: The send button displays only a ▶ icon with no accessible name (no text, no aria-label).

detection.fixedWhen: Send button has visible text or aria-label="Send message"

hint: Add aria-label="Send message" or include visible text alongside the icon.

name: Divvy Ditto
description: Interactive elements are implemented as <div onClick> instead of semantic <button> elements.

detection.fixedWhen: All clickable elements use <button> instead of <div onClick>

hint: Replace <div onClick> with <button>. Buttons provide keyboard support and screen reader semantics for free.

name: Linkless Ledyba
description: An empty <a> tag exists with no text content, making it invisible to screen readers and meaningless.

detection.fixedWhen: Empty link is removed or given meaningful text content

hint: Remove empty links, or add meaningful text content and a valid href.

name: Statusless Snorlax
description: Chat responses appear in the message area with no aria-live region, so screen readers are not notified of new content.

detection.fixedWhen: Message container has aria-live="polite" or uses a live region

hint: Add aria-live="polite" to the message container so screen readers announce new messages.
